name: antirug
description: AntiRug AI Multi-Agent Security Pipeline — Solana token rug-pull risk analysis

scripts.build: npx esbuild eliza-runtime.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist/eliza-runtime.mjs --banner:js="import{createRequire as __cr}from'module';const require=__cr(import.meta.url);" && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
